Canonicalize merchant_id
Replace source system IDs
with canonical UUIDs

ACK immediately

Add children
SAVEPOINT per child
Skip duplicates

transaction_id, merchant_id,
event_type, detection_type

Duplicate record

ACK + skip

DB error
Rollback + NO ACK
Message redelivered
